file_insights.previous_topic: CLI UX improvements (color-coded states, summary stats)
key_sections: Test results: 337 unit tests passed, 4 integration test suites passed
Security posture summary with risk levels
file_insights.documentation_quality: comprehensive - includes vulnerability descriptions, fixes, test coverage, and before/after analysis

patterns_discovered.pattern: Security vulnerability mitigation with test coverage
patterns_discovered.description: Each security fix follows pattern: vulnerability description → fix implementation → specific test case → coverage validation
Security implemented via Axum middleware (DefaultBodyLimit, custom headers, rate limiting)
Each vulnerability tagged with risk level (Critical, High, Medium) in summary table

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Token generation required when BOP_SERVE_TOKEN unset
gotchas_discovered.impact: Server no longer runs unauthenticated by default - changed AppState.token from Option<String> to String
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Generated token logged to stderr, backwards compatibility broken intentionally for security

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Card ID validation requires multiple attack vectors checked
gotchas_discovered.impact: Initial validation only rejected `/` and `\`, but URL encoding (`%2F`), path traversal (`..`), and null bytes bypassed it
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Enhanced to 4-layer validation: reject `..`, `%`, null bytes, restrict to `[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]` whitelist

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Rate limiting per-IP tracking requires Arc<Mutex>
gotchas_discovered.impact: Shared state across concurrent requests necessitated thread-safe data structure
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Implemented with HashMap<String, Vec<Instant>> wrapped in Arc<Mutex>

approach_outcome.execution_summary: All 7 security fixes implemented with comprehensive test coverage and documentation
deliverables: output/result.md with complete security audit documentation
6 security vulnerabilities fixed with test coverage
All acceptance criteria verified and passing

recommendations.recommendation: Add security hardening to deployment pipeline
recommendations.rationale: Rate limiting is IP-based; consider adding DNS-based rate limiting for distributed attack scenarios
Generated token is logged once; add guidance for operator token refresh procedures

recommendations.recommendation: Consider certificate pinning for client connections
recommendations.rationale: Security headers prevent attacks on served content, but not on bop client making requests to server

recommendations.recommendation: Add metric collection for rate limit hits
recommendations.rationale: Rate limiting in place but no observability of when/how often it's triggered
Memory shows nushell adapter ecosystem; adapter processes should be audited for similar vulnerabilities
